scenarios.title: Happy pathway to resolved pharmacy closure
scenarios.notes: Consent must become satisfied before package_ready and closure remains blocked until LifecycleCoordinator approves.

scenarios.title: Immediate global block to ineligible return
scenarios.notes: Minor-illness fallback is forbidden because s_global(x) >= tau_global_block.

scenarios.title: Provider or scope drift reopens consent_pending
scenarios.notes: Material provider, pathway, scope, or package drift invalidates prior consent and blocks dispatch.

scenarios.title: Weak outcome enters reconciliation review before return
scenarios.notes: Outcome truth remains case-local until the reconciliation gate is explicitly settled.

scenarios.title: Urgent bounce-back dominates ordinary status
scenarios.notes: Urgent return remains typed and may not be flattened into unresolved_returned or quiet patient reassurance.
